context_text: <A> and i learned a lot from that and so um friendships kind of shed away as i pulled back my own unequivocal support and friendship you know / <B> mhm / <A> uh because i saw it wasn't necessary to be putting so much into it the relationship if it was solid would stand on its own but it became like um uh you know i was not their caretaker any longer / <B> okay / <A> you know or and maybe if some people would even say enabler / <B> okay
